oai_dc:dc.dc:title: The Future of Watchbird

oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 47 Number 1 (December 2020).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.7KURXJKWKRVHVDPH\HDUV\RXKDYHQRGRXEWQRWLFHGKRZPDQ\SULQWPDJD]LQHVKDYHGLV DSSHDUHGIURPRXUUDQNV2QHRQO\KDVWRORRNDVIDUDV%LUGWDONZKLFKKDVEHHQJRQHIRUVHYHUDO\HDUV QRZDQGHYHQDQDWWHPSWWRUHYLYHLWGLJLWDOO\ZDVXQVXFFHVVIXO)RUPDQ\RIWKRVHPDJD]LQHVGHFOLQLQJ FLUFXODWLRQDQGWKHVN\URFNHWLQJFRVWVIRUSULQWLQJDQGGLVWULEXWLRQKDYHWROOHGWKHGHDWKNQHOO:DWFKELUG H[SHULHQFHGWKRVHVDPHFRVWLQFUHDVHV,QDQDWWHPSWWRFRQWDLQWKRVHFRVWV$)$KDVFXWGRZQRQWKHQXP EHURILVVXHVRI:DWFKELUGZKLFKKDVSURYHGGLVDSSRLQWLQJWRPDQ\RI\RX%\QHFHVVLW\WKH\HDUKDVSURYHQWRXVDOOWKDWZHFDQPDVWHUQHZZD\VRIGRLQJWKLQJV6RPHZH¶YH FRPHWROLNH-VRPHQRWVRPXFK7KH\HDURIZLOOQRGRXEWEHD\HDURIH[SHULPHQWDWLRQZKLOHZH DVVHVVZKDWZRUNVEHVWLQSXEOLVKLQJ:DWFKELUG6RPHRIWKHXVXDOSDJHVZHSXEOLVKDUHQRWSUHVHQWLQWKLV LVVXH6RPHLQIRUPDWLRQZLOOEHUHWXUQLQJLQQH[W\HDU¶VLVVXHVDORQJZLWKDGYHUWLVLQJRSSRUWXQLWLHV6RPH LQIRUPDWLRQZLOOEHDYDLODEOHRQO\RQWKHZHEVLWHLQRUGHUWRNHHSLWFXUUHQW<RXULQSXWDVWRZKDW\RX ZRXOGOLNHWRVHHLQ:DWFKELUGLVLPSRUWDQW$)$ZDQWVWRKHDUIURP\RXClick the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
